name: dd-dev-server
description: Long-lived HTTP server that spawns coding agents against a warm configured git checkout and streams events.

scripts.minikube:build: bash -lc 'eval "$(minikube docker-env)" && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --secret id=github_deploy_key,src="${GH_DEPLOY_KEY_PATH:-$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519}" -t dd-dev-server-local:latest .'
scripts.minikube:build-ec2-dev-server: bash -lc 'eval "$(minikube docker-env)" && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --build-arg DD_REPO_URL="${DD_REPO_URL:-git@github.com:ORESoftware/k8s-cluster.git}" --build-arg DD_REPO_REF="${DD_REPO_REF:-dev}" --secret id=github_deploy_key,src="${GH_DEPLOY_KEY_PATH:-$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519}" -t dd-dev-server:dev ../dev-server'
scripts.minikube:build-ec2-mirror-images: pnpm run minikube:build-ec2-web-home && pnpm run minikube:build-ec2-dev-server
scripts.test:local-smoke: pnpm run test:minikube-manifest && pnpm run test:thread-smoke && pnpm run test:thread-ui-smoke
